title: Switch Result View Performance Test: Initial Load Time
description: Verify that the initial load time of the switch result view is within a reasonable timeframe.

description: Verify that the switch result view can handle a large amount of data without significant performance degradation.

title: Switch Result View Performance Test: Filtering and Sorting
description: Verify that the switch result view can handle filtering and sorting operations without significant performance degradation.

title: Unauthorized Access to Switch Result View
description: Validate that an unauthorized user cannot access the switch result view.

description: Validate that the switch result view correctly handles invalid or malicious data.

title: Cross-Site Scripting (XSS) Vulnerability in Switch Result View
description: Validate that the switch result view is not vulnerable to cross-site scripting attacks.

title: Switch Result View: Initial State
description: Validate that the initial state of the switch result view is intuitive and easy to understand.

title: Switch Result View: Navigation and Filtering
description: Validate that the user can navigate between different result views and apply filters correctly.

title: Switch Result View: Error Handling
description: Validate that the application handles errors correctly when switching between result views.

description: Validate that the switch result view behaves similarly on iOS and Android devices.

description: Validate that the switch result view adapts to different screen sizes and resolutions.

description: Validate that the switch result view is compatible with different web browsers.

title: API Test: Fetch Restaurant Results
description: Validate that the API returns a list of restaurant results when switching to the result view

description: Validate that the API filters restaurant results by rating when switching to the result view and selecting a specific rating range

title: API Test: Sort Restaurant Results by Distance
description: Validate that the API sorts restaurant results by distance when switching to the result view and selecting a specific sorting option

title: Test Case: Validating Result View Data Integrity
description: This test case validates the data integrity of the result view in the mobile application, ensuring that CRUD operations are correct and calculations are accurate.

title: Test Case: Validating Mandatory Fields in Result View
description: This test case validates the mandatory fields in the result view, ensuring that required information is present and accurate.

title: Test Case: Validating Foreign Key Relationships in Result View
description: This test case validates the foreign key relationships in the result view, ensuring that related data is accurate and consistent.

title: Network Interruption Handling: App Crash Recovery
description: Validate that the app recovers from a network interruption and displays the previous results without losing data.

title: GPS Signal Loss Behavior: App Crash Recovery
description: Validate that the app recovers from a GPS signal loss and displays the previous results without losing data.

title: Session Timeout Handling: Data Persistence Across Crashes
description: Validate that the app persists user session data across crashes and displays the previous results without losing data.
